blended.narrative: Breckenridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
